result.text:
🏞️ New Feature: Our NFT Integration is Live!

You can now view your NFTs, including floor prices and instant sell prices from @tradeportxyz — all within Pawtato Board and our Mobile App!

We've got plenty of NFT features in the pipeline to ensure you get the best possible experience with your assets.

Check it out now:
🖥️  dApp ➤ https://t.co/q0U6GjUtKl 
📱    App  ➤ https://t.co/ffrzKn3qha

legacy.full_text:
@PawtatoFinance @tradeportxyz @SuiNetwork This is a brilliant addition to a fantastic app. It was the missing piece and now it’s here. So much easier to keep on top of everything. Beautifully laid out as always, and with links to Suiscan and Tradeport.
Great job team 👏👏👏🎉🚀
